zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Sarah Anne Everard於1520年1月11日出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利時，她的父親Sir Henry Everard47歲，母親Lady Margaret Wiseman21歲。她於大約1545年與John Chapman在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利結婚。她去世於1580年1月11日在英國英格蘭盧特藍德布勞恩斯頓享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Sarah Anne Everard于1520年1月11日出生在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利时，她的父亲Sir Henry Everard47岁，母亲Lady Margaret Wiseman21岁。她于大约1545年与John Chapman在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利结婚。她去世于1580年1月11日在英国英格兰盧特藍德布勞恩斯頓享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Sarah Anne Everard was born on 11 January 1520, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Everard, was 47 and her mother, Lady Margaret Wiseman, was 21. She married John Chapman about 1545, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She died on 11 January 1580, in Braunston, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales, United Kin: Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Sarah Anne Everard est née le 11 janvier 1520, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Everard, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Wiseman, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Chapman environ 1545, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1580, à Braunston, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Sarah Anne Everard am 11. Januar 1520 in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Everard 47 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Wiseman 21. Sie hat um 1545 in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom John Chapman geheiratet. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1580 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Braunston, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sarah Anne Everard è nata il il 11 gennaio 1520 nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry Everard, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Wiseman, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Chapman circa 1545, nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 gennaio 1580, nel Braunston, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sarah Anne Everardが1520年1月11日にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Everardは47歳，母Lady Margaret Wisemanは21歳であった。約1545年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーでJohn Chapmanと結婚した。彼女は1580年1月11日にイギリスイギリスルトランドブラウンストンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sarah Anne Everard(이)가 1520년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Everard(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Wiseman(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 John Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1580년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 브라스턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.11 January 1520–11 January 1580: 11 de janeiro de 1520–11 de janeiro de 1580
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sarah Anne Everard nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1520, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Everard, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Wiseman, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chapman aproximadamente 1545, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1580, em Braunston, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Sarah Anne Everard родилась 11 января 1520 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Everard было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Wiseman, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chapman около 1545 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 11 января 1580 г. в местности браунстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.11 January 1520–11 January 1580: 11 de enero de 1520–11 de enero de 1580
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Sarah Anne Everard nació el 11 de enero de 1520, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Everard, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Wiseman, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Chapman aproximadamente 1545, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de enero de 1580, en Braunston, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
